foundation.theorem: one machine-checked self-proven theorem: there is no nothing
foundation.trace: One -> fold spectrum -> b = 2 and c = 3 -> two c-windows minus their b-overlap form four residues -> terminal orientation quartet -> v3 generated-geometry selector

orientation_relation.geometric_readout: dimensionless topology of the terminal four-residue union
orientation_relation.purpose: select the relative orientation of two overlapping local three-residue planes

primary: terminal orientation-quartet hydrophobic dispersion relative to its generated background
terminal orientation-quartet radius squared relative to its endogenous adjacent step
secondary: complete-prefix hydrophobic dispersion relative to its generated background
complete-prefix radius squared relative to its endogenous adjacent step

frontier_optimization.rule: sort all candidates by the primary orientation key; compute the complete-prefix secondary key only for candidates at or below the 24th local-key boundary, including every boundary tie
frontier_optimization.exactness: a candidate above the 24th primary-key boundary cannot enter a 24-state frontier under any secondary key
frontier_optimization.purpose: avoid complete-prefix construction for candidates mathematically excluded by the primary orientation relation

component_routes.24_lattice: forward-forced exact finite state constitution from the protected construction
component_routes.peptide_geometry: named forward-forcing constitution with byte-exact protected-witness replay

status: development relation awaiting source-bound applied protein data
